name: Basic Vegetarian Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
You can substitute fresh tomatoes in this recipe.
Remember 1 pound of fresh equals 1 cup of canned.
1. Finely chop together the carrot, celery, onion, parsley and basil, or pulse them in a food processor.
2. Warm the olive oil in a large skillet.
3. Saute the chopped vegetables for 10 minutes, stirring often.
4. Puree the tomatoes through a food mill into the pan.
5. Add the salt and several grindings of pepper.
6. Bring to a simmer and cook, partly covered, over very low heat, for 2 hours.
7. Pass the finished sauce through the medium blade of the food mill. Makes 3 Cups
